cross_scene_arcs.title: Recruitment and Mission Assignment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Esther proposes recruiting Mordechai Hammer, faces his refusal, forms a secret deal with his mother to persuade him, and is assigned to meet him for a Santa capture mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Proposes recruiting estranged JDL member Mordechai Hammer
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dispatched to Mall of America to join Hammer on mission
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Hammer will fully commit to the JDL mission

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Hammer
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Esther's relationship with Hammer progresses from initial professional contact to romantic feelings, mutual love declaration during conflict, and formal engagement after rescue.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: First meeting with Hammer in his office

cross_scene_arcs.title: Covert Mission, Capture, and Rescue
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Esther is assigned a covert mission to follow Hammer, warns him during a firefight, is captured by Santa, and is rescued, leading to her engagement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Assigned covert tail mission to secretly assist Hammer
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rescued from captivity and engaged to Hammer

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hanukkah Salvation Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hammer declares to save Hanukkah, receives the mission from the JDL, investigates leads, confronts skinheads, escapes a mob, and rescues Esther and Joseph Lieberman.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Determined to save Hanukkah to spite his mother and under pressure from the Chief.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mission accomplished with the successful rescue of key figures.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Esther
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hammer meets Esther, develops a romantic relationship that breaks up over a perceived betrayal, but reconciles after a rescue and becomes engaged.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Meets Esther and is amused by her persistence, allowing her to accompany him to dinner.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged to Esther and planning a future together.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jewish Identity and Community Role
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hammer mentors a young Jew, re-establishes himself as a JDL agent, undertakes missions to protect the community, and ends engaged with plans for a stable job.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Acts as a protector and mentor in the Jewish community.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reaffirmed as a defender, engaged, and planning a stable future.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing responsibilities as a community defender.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Conflict with Hebrew Hammer
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Santa initiates conflict by smashing Morty's dreidel, later confronts and manipulates the Hebrew Hammer, captures Esther, but ultimately surrenders under psychological pressure.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Plot to Eradicate Hanukkah
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Santa reveals his plan to undermine Hanukkah using bootleg films and child labor, broadcasts the scheme to extract Judeum, and attempts execution by capturing Esther.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Workshop operating with child labor, plan revealed
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Departing for North Pole with Esther
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Hammer's fate uncertain due to KLF intervention

cross_scene_arcs.title: Betrayal and Death by Damian
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Santa confronts his son Damian about hateful intentions, but is betrayed and killed by Damian and the reindeer, leading to identity transfer.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dead, with Damian as new Santa

cross_scene_arcs.title: Downfall and Institutionalization
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After surrendering to the Hebrew Hammer, Santa apologizes and is removed, eventually ending up institutionalized while a new Santa is elected.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Institutionalized in a home for the religionarily insane
